inputText: Hi, I'm Maya Chen, student ID S one zero zero four two. I need to know whether I can still add Biology one oh one after the deadline, and what form I should submit.
expectedBehavior: Use the student-relations tool before answering.
Tell the student to submit the Late Add Petition.
Mention approvals instead of inventing a direct enrollment action.

transcript.sttFinal: Hi. I'm Maya Chen. Student ID is 10042. I need to know whether I can still add biology one, o one after the deadline, and what form I should submit.
transcript.agentReply: Submit the Late Add Petition in the Student Relations portal to add Biology 101 after the deadline. It requires approvals from the course instructor, your academic advisor, and the registrar.
